tools.Name: Agent S
tools.Description: An open agentic framework that enables autonomous interaction with computers by learning to use GUI interfaces like a human.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex tasks across desktop applications on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

tools.Name: SkyPilot
tools.Description: A unified platform to run, manage, and scale AI workloads across any infrastructure including Kubernetes, Slurm, and 20+ cloud providers.
tools.Use_Case: Managing AI training, serving, and orchestration across heterogeneous computing resources.

tools.Name: MarkItDown
tools.Description: A lightweight Python utility for converting various file formats (PDF, Word, Excel, images, etc.) into Markdown specifically for use with LLMs.
tools.Use_Case: Preparing diverse documents and multimedia data to be processed by LLMs for analysis.
